states.name: requested
states.description: Device Session requested but Lease/connection/capabilities not yet validated.
entry_requirements: Workspace, Device and requested capability scope exist.

states.name: establishing
states.description: Lease, fence, exact connection bindings and capability snapshot are being established.
entry_requirements: Current Lease and binding contexts exist.

states.name: active
states.description: Session is available under current Lease/fence and exact connection binding epochs.
entry_requirements: Current capability snapshot and binding evidence exist.

states.name: partial
states.description: Session remains available for only an explicit capability subset.

states.name: recovering
states.description: One or more bindings are being replaced/reconciled and stale work is fenced.

states.name: closing
states.description: New control/mutation is blocked and Streams, forwarding, credentials, helpers, data and Lease authority are being cleaned/revoked.
entry_requirements: Close request and cleanup plan exist.

states.name: closed
states.description: Session ended and every required cleanup/revocation check passed.
entry_requirements: Cleanup verification and Lease disposition exist.

states.name: failed
states.description: Session failed before clean closure; active effects and cleanup requirements remain recoverable/reviewable.

states.name: cleanup_failed
states.description: Session ended or failed but cleanup/revocation cannot be proven; Device reassignment is blocked by quarantine.
entry_requirements: Cleanup failure evidence and Device quarantine decision exist.

required_preconditions: Current Lease/fence, Device Profile and exact connection bindings are valid.
Current capability snapshot and connection evidence support requested scope.
Connection/Provider/Lease discontinuity exists and stale work is fenced.
New control/mutation is blocked and active-operation/cleanup disposition exists.
Streams/forwarding/helpers/credentials/accounts/data are cleaned as required, Lease is released and cleanup is verified.
Failure, uncertain effects and remaining cleanup obligations are recorded.
Cleanup/revocation cannot be proven and Device quarantine is recorded.
